html:
Exclusive to:

GenericOccupiedBurnt

The Driftwood Rocker is craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be crafted with 4 Driftwood Pieces and require a Sawhorse to prototype. Sitting on the Driftwood Rocker causes it to rock back and forth, and the player cannot perform any emotes while seated. Pearl also can sit on it, if it is on Pearl's territory.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Event skin does not drop normally. Instead, it is usable by everyone during the official Winter's Feast event.
Event
The Merrymaker Collection

plainText:
Exclusive to:
Driftwood Rocker
"Have a seat, you'll be drifting away in no time."
Structure Info
Can be Burned
Can be Hammered
Crafting
×4
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"hermit_chair_rocking"
GenericOccupiedBurnt
“I'd like to sit on that!”
–Wilson
“That will definitely burn.”
–Willow
“Is tiny chair strong enough to hold Wolfgang?”
–Wolfgang
“Abigail?”
–Wendy
“MY CHAIR”
–WX-78
“Reminds me of the chair in my reading nook.”
–Wickerbottom
“Just look at that quality woodworking!”
–Woodie
“I'm appalled by the idea of sitting for some reason.”
–Maxwell
“A warriör döth nöt sit.”
–Wigfrid
“Mother said I could never sit still.”
–Webber
“Mon chair.”
–Warly
“Sit Place”
–Wormwood
“Looks sturdy enough.”
–Winona
“I'll take a seat and rest my feet.”
–Wortox
“Oooh, fancy sitting-place!”
–Wurt
“Sorry Woby, that's not for you.”
–Walter
“I believe in my time, we called that a chair.”
–Wanda
“Somebody else is sitting on that.”
–Wilson
“You sure you want to sit there? That chair may spontaneously combust.”
–Willow
“Do not worry, friend. Wolfgang will stand.”
–Wolfgang
“You might be sitting on Abigail.”
–Wendy
“I WAS GOING TO SIT THERE”
–WX-78
“If you're going to sit, you might as well read.”
–Wickerbottom
“They're takin' a load off, eh?”
–Woodie
“Good. You sit. Forever.”
–Maxwell
“Ön yöur feet, söldier!”
–Wigfrid
“Mother said I could never sit still.”
–Webber
“Leur chair.”
–Warly
“That okay! Will sit somewhere else”
–Wormwood
“Looks like that seat's spoken for.”
–Winona
“Move your rear, I want to sit here!”
–Wortox
“Wanna turn! Move over!”
–Wurt
“Sorry Woby, that's not for you.”
–Walter
“It is occupied.”
–Wanda
“I wouldn't like to sit on that.”
–Wilson
“Aww, it's over.”
–Willow
“Chair looks burnt and sad.”
–Wolfgang
“Oh well.”
–Wendy
“YOU CAN HAVE IT NOW, FLESHLINGS”
–WX-78
“Can't we have any nice things?”
–Wickerbottom
“It's just so sad...”
–Woodie
“Better that way.”
–Maxwell
“The göds hath nö need för chairs.”
–Wigfrid
“We thought we smelled burning.”
–Webber
“Chair brûlé.”
–Warly
“Oh no!”
–Wormwood
“I ain't one to sit around anyway.”
–Winona
“I see this seat's been taken.”
–Wortox
“Aww...”
–Wurt
“That's why we should never play with matches.”
–Walter
“Its chairing days are done.”
–Wanda
The Driftwood Rocker is craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be crafted with 4 Driftwood Pieces and require a Sawhorse to prototype. Sitting on the Driftwood Rocker causes it to rock back and forth, and the player cannot perform any emotes while seated.
Pearl also can sit on it, if it is on Pearl's territory.
Skins[edit | edit source]
Main article: Belongings
The Event skin does not drop normally. Instead, it is usable by everyone during the official Winter's Feast event.
